cardsPerPage.desc: Number of character cards shown per page in the discovery view.

toastPosition.desc: Where toast notifications appear on screen.

toastDuration.desc: How long toast messages stay visible (in seconds).

showUserFork.desc: Show the fork button on user message bubbles.

assistantButtonOrder.label: Assistant/System button order
assistantButtonOrder.desc: Arrange buttons shown on assistant and system message bubbles using the arrow buttons.

userButtonOrder.label: User button order
userButtonOrder.desc: Arrange buttons shown on user message bubbles using the arrow buttons.

unreadBadges.label: Insignias de Mensajes No Leídos
unreadBadges.desc: Mostrar el recuento de mensajes no leídos en las tarjetas de chat y en la pestaña del navegador.

unreadSound.desc: Reproducir un sonido cuando llegue un nuevo mensaje mientras estás ausente.

activeProvider.desc: Select which AI provider to use for chat.

openrouter.name: OpenRouter

lmStudio.name: LM Studio

oocDelimiters.desc: Enable custom delimiters to mark out-of-character messages.

oocSystem.label: AI OOC Instructions
oocSystem.desc: Instructions for the AI on how to handle out-of-character requests.

personaInjectionTemplate.desc: Template for injecting persona context into prompts.

userRolePrefixWithPersona.desc: Prefix for user messages when a persona is active.

systemRolePrefixOoc.desc: Prefix for system messages in out-of-character mode.

assistantRolePrefixOoc.desc: Prefix for assistant messages in out-of-character mode.

userRolePrefixOoc.label: USER Role Prefix in OOC
userRolePrefixOoc.desc: Prefix for user messages in out-of-character mode.

writingInjectionTiming.label: Writing Instructions Injection Timing
writingInjectionTiming.desc: When writing instructions are injected into the prompt.

writingPlacement.label: Writing Instructions Placement
writingPlacement.desc: Where writing instructions are placed in the prompt.

writingMessageRole.desc: Role used for the writing instructions message when placed at the end of messages.

firstMessageRole.desc: Role assigned to the first message prompt.

firstMessagePrompt.desc: Prompt template for generating the first message.

continueRole.label: CONTINUE Prompt Role
continueRole.desc: Role assigned to the continue prompt.

database.exportDesc: Export all data to a JSON file for backup or transfer.
database.importDesc: Import data from a previously exported JSON file.
database.resetDesc: Erase all data and restore the application to its original state.
database.resetConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete all your data, including characters, chats, personas, settings, API keys, and writing instructions. The application will be restored to its original state. This action cannot be undone.
database.resetSuccess: Database has been reset to its default state
